description_long: This is a crumpled aluminum can with a Mountain Dew label, featuring a predominantly green, yellow, and black color scheme. The can is cylindrical but visibly deformed, with several dents and a partially crushed body, especially near the top and bottom rims. The top of the can has a standard pull-tab opening, which appears to be intact but surrounded by wrinkled metal. The label displays the Mountain Dew logo in bold red and white letters, along with nutritional information and a barcode on the reverse side. The can's surface is glossy, reflecting light, and the printed graphics are slightly distorted due to the deformation. No liquid is visible inside, and the can appears empty.
description: A crumpled, empty Mountain Dew aluminum can with a glossy, colorful label and visible dents and deformations.
description_view_0: The bottom of the can is visible, showing the pull-tab opening and pronounced crumpling around the rim.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the Mountain Dew logo and the can's dented, wrinkled body.
description_view_2: The top rim and the opposite side of the can are visible, with more deformation and the logo partially wrapped around.
description_view_3: The back of the can displays the barcode, nutritional information, and extensive surface dents.
attribute_label_or_branding: Mountain Dew logo in red and white, green and yellow background, barcode, nutritional information, and product details in black and white text.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Multiple visible dents, crumpling, and deformation throughout the can body.
